home.aiImgAlt: From keyboard to code through an AI weave

about.p1: It all began in 1998, when Fatih SEZER typed the first command — cat — into the embedded software of an Amstrad CPC 6128. One monitor, one keyboard, and curiosity without borders.
about.p2: 2001–2004 lived at the heart of hardware: motherboards, power supplies, electronics repair. Then years of assembly, electronics software and database programming… In 2004 that craft became the free Sanas platform gathering on the web.
about.p3: A free team across the world gathered software under one source; with dual-cycle development and elevated security, commercial system developer structures took shape. The company took the name Sanas Technology; its vision sharpened in mechatronics, economics, logistics and healthcare.
about.p4: Today more than 20 years of global software development, electronics design, high-marginal-utility economic models and advanced logistics coordination live under one roof: we are honoured and proud to serve our clients.
about.netCaption: One mind · One keyboard — a structure grown by communication

projects.intro: Where ideas leave the lab and grow under real-world load. Meet a few of the endless solutions we bring to life.
projects.p1Desc: School resource management — enrollment, auth and mobile client for students, parents, teachers and staff.
projects.p1Tech: Flutter, Go, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, Firebase
projects.p2Desc: AI assistant for doctors — mobile, web and desktop. From epicrisis drafting to clinical flow.
projects.p3Desc: International cancer labelling research. AlloyDB-backed statistics that digitize written tests.
projects.p4Desc: QR-card web game platform — interactive games for corporate and individual play.
projects.p4Tech: ASP.NET MVC, SignalR, SQL Server, Firebase
projects.p5Desc: AI-assisted food ordering — a mobile experience with a fixed infrastructure fee model.
projects.p6Desc: Mechatronic hologram project — a large AI-powered speaking holographic system.
projects.p7Desc: AI messaging for couples only — WhatsApp and Instagram in one private space.
projects.p8Desc: Personal health and life tracking — on-device data, reports and widgets.
projects.p9Desc: Years before Ghost-like backup tools — our engine even compressed camera frames for unlimited recording.
projects.p10Desc: A palm-sized PC we built first — red laser touch like a mouse sensor, PIC16F84, wireless, 8 GB; even MSN ran on it.
projects.p11Desc: Our first Linux-based OS — powered firewalls for large banks in Germany and Greece; still used where data security is critical.
projects.p12Desc: A system where the camera reads only that card even from two metres. Unlike QR, an audio microchip we designed — and cannot be broken.
projects.p13Desc: A robotic arm for warehouses — picks the product, packs the box, seals the tape and loads the truck.
projects.p14Desc: A B2B online commerce network — orders, supply and company graph in one custom system.

solutions.dom2Extra: Trust, verification and traffic analysis with advanced connectivity.
solutions.dom3Extra: Systems that refuse downtime in clinical and administrative flows.

solutions.s1Desc: Payments, accounting and trading systems. Marginal utility and real operations in one discipline: formulas proven in the field.
solutions.s2Desc: Routes, fleets and warehouses. Trust, verification and traffic analysis with advanced connectivity.
solutions.s3Desc: Sensitive data, uninterrupted access. Systems that refuse downtime in clinical and administrative flows.
solutions.s4Desc: Models run inside products, not in showcases. Recommendation, automation and decision support in production.
solutions.s5Desc: Embedded systems, robotics and electronics. Electrical, electronics and software in a shared set.
solutions.s6Desc: Deployment, monitoring and high availability in the cloud. Observable, scalable delivery.
solutions.s7Desc: Desktop, web, embedded and integrated devices — project-specific languages and cycles; compliant delivery.
solutions.s8Desc: Databases, storage and backup; real-time access and traffic optimisation with original algorithms.
solutions.s9Desc: iOS, Android and desktop — one product, one experience, including store pipelines.
solutions.s10Desc: Security is not bolted on later; it is built into the architecture. Access, encryption and audit as production standard.

team.p1: The Sanas tree grows from one root: software, economics, intelligence, logistics and healthcare under one engineering discipline. A core team from around the world gathers products under a single source and carries them live.
team.p2: For corporate or personal software support you can also reach us via İstiklal Yazılım — a Sanas Technology company.
team.quote: We did not start this path in comfortable offices, side by side at desks; we started kilometres apart, locked on one goal. Distance did not divide us; we looked at screens with two eyes and wrote as if from one keyboard with one hand. We grew by facing the hardest crises of technology remotely. As we worked, Sanas grew; as Sanas grew, that unshakable bond of brotherhood took deeper root. Behind the screens there is one mind and a brave stance. If we raise the heaviest systems today, it is because of men who trust each other with eyes closed. The greatest solutions come from those who cross not distances, but limits.
